name: Focaccia #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water with olive oil, 1 tsp salt, and sugar.
2. Stir in the flour a little at a time; when you can no longer stir by hand, turn the dough onto a floured surface and knead until the dough is smooth and elastic.
3. Place dough in an oiled bowl and let rise until it has doubled in size, about 30-40 minutes.
4. Shape the dough into an oval that is about 1/2 inch thick using a rolling pin. Make decorative cuts on the top of the loaf with a sharp knife.
5. Place the loaf on an oiled baking sheet, brush with olive oil, and sprinkle with coarse salt (also sprinkle with optional chopped olives or chopped onions, if desired). Let rise for 20 minutes.
6. Pre-heat oven to 450°F. Bake loaf for 20-30 minutes, until bread is nicely browned.
7. Serve hot from the oven.
